                            <span class="type-indicator">A:</span> <span class="content"><p data-pm-slice="1 1 []">Yes, we offer free PDF proofs for review that you’ll receive within 24 business hours. Note that production turnaround doesn’t start until your artwork is approved, and to help avoid delays we will bypass your approval 3 business days after generating your proof if we haven’t yet received your feedback or approval.</p><span>
						</div>
					</div>
									<div class="faq-item">
						<div class="faq-question">
                            <span class="type-indicator">Q:</span> <span class="content">Do you charge extra based on the number of colors and ink coverage?<span>
						</div>
						<div class="faq-answer">
                            <span class="type-indicator">A:</span> <span class="content"><p>We don't add fees for ink coverage or the number of colors on digital prints. Our products come in a variety of color options to suit different needs. Plus, with Packola, you see the total price immediately with our real-time pricing.</p><span>
						</div>
					</div>
									<div class="faq-item">
						<div class="faq-question">
                            <span class="type-indicator">Q:</span> <span class="content">Do you charge for plates and dies? Are there any hidden costs?<span>
						</div>
						<div class="faq-answer">
                            <span class="type-indicator">A:</span> <span class="content"><p>No. There are no hidden fees of any kind. What you see is what you pay.</p><span>
						</div>
					</div>
									<div class="faq-item">
						<div class="faq-question">
                            <span class="type-indicator">Q:</span> <span class="content">Where are your products manufactured?<span>
						</div>
						<div class="faq-answer">
                            <span class="type-indicator">A:</span> <span class="content"><p>We manufacture all our products in the United States. Based on the order specifications and shipping ZIP code, we pick a facility that yields the best result.</p><span>
						</div>
					</div>
									<div class="faq-item">
						<div class="faq-question">
                            <span class="type-indicator">Q:</span> <span class="content">Do you check my artwork for technical issues like alignment and image resolution?<span>
						</div>
						<div class="faq-answer">
                            <span class="type-indicator">A:</span> <span class="content"><p>Yes. We inspect all artwork to ensure it is perfect for printing during the proofing process. If we find a problem, we will fix it or contact you for further instructions. Your proof will come with all corrections and edits for transparency. However, we will not be responsible for misspellings or incorrect content once printing begins.</p><span>
						</div>
					</div>
									<div class="faq-item">
						<div class="faq-question">
                            <span class="type-indicator">Q:</span> <span class="content">How can I reorder?<span>
						</div>
						<div class="faq-answer">
                            <span class="type-indicator">A:</span> <span class="content"><p>Simply go to Your Account and click on the REORDER button next to your desired item. Proceed to checkout and place your order.</p><span>
						</div>
					</div>
									<div class="faq-item">
						<div class="faq-question">
                            <span class="type-indicator">Q:</span> <span class="content">What is the difference between Shipping, Product, and Mailer boxes?<span>
						</div>
						<div class="faq-answer">
                            <span class="type-indicator">A:</span> <span class="content"><p>Shipping boxes -</p>
<p>   <strong>•</strong> Also known as Regular Slotted Containers,</p>
<p>   <strong>•</strong> Sturdy, efficient, and reliable packaging that holds and protects products during transit.</p>
<p>Mailer boxes - </p>
<p>   <strong>• </strong>Commonly used for subscription shipments and serve a similar purpose to shipping boxes.</p>
<p>   <strong>• </strong>Offer enhanced protection and have a more elegant style, making for a fun unboxing experience.</p>
<p>Product boxes -</p>
<p>   <strong>• </strong>Retail packaging for products displayed on store shelves.</p>
<p>   <strong>• </strong>Often made of cardstock or paperboard and have attractive designs that grab attention.</p>
<p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">We highly recommend using shipping boxes or mailers for product shipping and delivery. We do not encourage shipping a product using a product box alone.</p><span>
						</div>
					</div>
									<div class="faq-item">
						<div class="faq-question">
                            <span class="type-indicator">Q:</span> <span class="content">Why can’t we print on the hidden areas of the box?<span>
						</div>
						<div class="faq-answer">
                            <span class="type-indicator">A:</span> <span class="content"><p>The hidden areas of the box, or areas that won’t be seen once the box is assembled, are typically reserved for production markings, quality control, and other manufacturing purposes that ensure your boxes look great.</p><span>
						</div>
					</div>
									<div class="faq-item">
						<div class="faq-question">
                            <span class="type-indicator">Q:</span> <span class="content">Can you ship to Canada and other US Territories?<span>
						</div>
						<div class="faq-answer">
                            <span class="type-indicator">A:</span> <span class="content"><p>Yes. We ship to Canada (taxes and duties not included). We also offer parcel shipping to Puerto Rico.</p><span>
						</div>
					</div>
									<div class="faq-item">
						<div class="faq-question">
                            <span class="type-indicator">Q:</span> <span class="content">Can we use our own shipping account?<span>
						</div>
						<div class="faq-answer">
                            <span class="type-indicator">A:</span> <span class="content"><p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true" data-pm-slice="1 1 []">Currently, we only support using your own shipping account for FedEx or UPS.</p>
<p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true" data-pm-slice="1 1 []"> </p>
<p data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">If you’d like to use your account, you’ll need to provide the following details to our team:</p>
<p><strong>   •</strong> Account number</p>
<p><strong>   • </strong>Billing ZIP code</p>
<p><strong>   • </strong>Full billing address associated with the account</p><span>
						</div>
					</div>

<h2>Are Custom Boxes Worth It?</h2>
<p>Custom boxes are a smart investment for protecting products and reducing waste, thanks to their perfect fit. They act as a marketing tool, enhancing brand recognition with unique designs without extra costs for colors or customization.</p>
<br>
<h2>Custom Branded Packaging</h2>
<p>Branded packaging transforms the packaging into a reflection of your brand's identity, enhancing the customer's unboxing experience. It incorporates your brand's colors, logos, and message, turning every package into a personal touchpoint that fosters loyalty.</p>
<p>Boxes are more than just a way to pack and ship items safely. With the right design to best represent your brand, the humble box can also boost brand recall and offer a memorable unboxing experience for your customers.</p>
<p>Packola offers you a choice selection of custom packaging solutions to suit your specific needs. From product boxes for individual retail items, to mailer boxes for subscription services and corporate giveaways, to sturdy shipping boxes that move your products safely from warehouse to end user, just take your pick and order today.</p>

<script>
    var searchBarInputs = document.querySelectorAll('.search-bar-input');
    var searchBarButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.search-bar-btn');

    searchBarInputs.forEach(function(searchBarInput) {
        searchBarInput.addEventListener('keypress', onLoadSearchKeypress);
    });

    searchBarButtons.forEach(function(searchBarButton) {
        searchBarButton.addEventListener('click', onLoadSearchClick);
    });

    function onLoadSearchKeypress(event) {
        if (!window.searchClientLoaded) {
            if (event.key === 'Enter') {
                onLoadSearchRedirect(event.target.value);
            }
        }
    }

    function onLoadSearchClick(event) {
        if (!window.searchClientLoaded) {
            var target = event.target.dataset.target;
            onLoadSearchRedirect(document.querySelector('#' + target).value);
        }
    }

    function onLoadSearchRedirect(keyword) {
        if (!window.searchClientLoaded) {
            window.location.href = "/search/" + keyword;
        }
    }
